title: payee does not enforce DUST_THRESHOLD on incoming payment requests
description: Payer enforces amount_zatoshi < DUST_THRESHOLD before creating a session. Payee Vacant handler accepts any incoming PaymentAction::Request without validating the amount. A peer running an old client (or a malicious client) can request a zero or dust payment and the payee will proceed to generate an address and enter the Pending state. This is asymmetric validation that a future contributor will copy in one direction and miss in the other. Enforce DUST_THRESHOLD on the payee Vacant arm as well, with a warn! and a close of the session.
